description: manifests/phase0/work-packs/<topic-slug>.json -- the bounded L3 packet handed to the semantic step. Derived entirely from topic-source-rankings.json's exhaustive candidate set for this topic; never hand-authored, never a second source of truth for source facts. Concentration is by whole tier plus an elbow cut on the body tiers, never a fixed count.

target_queries.description: Copied from manifests/topic-registry.json for this topic. Registry remains the owner; this is a convenience projection.

concentrated_candidates.description: The filename/h1/heading tiers in full, plus the elbow-selected portion of body_strong/body_weak. Duplicates collapsed to one representative.

duplicates_of_this.description: Other source_ids that are exact/normalized duplicates of this representative.

continue_by_gap.description: Fixed instruction: read the concentrated set first; pull the next held_in_custody source only if a critical/routine target query is still unresolved; stop when resolved or no further readable source remains. Never a fixed page/source count.

disclosure.description: Counts must reconcile with topic-source-rankings.json for this topic so the work pack can never silently narrow what the reader believes was considered.
